title: Creamy Midnight-Craving Portuguese Turkey Mince Stir-fry
description: A fresh and creamy Portuguese dish featuring turkey mince with a touch of midnight-craving flavor, made with kosher-friendly ingredients.

ingredients.name: Pickled Onions
ingredients.notes: Use sparingly as per taste preference.

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large pan over medium heat. Add the chopped garlic and cook until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add the turkey mince to the pan and stir for about 5 minutes or until browned.
Stir in tomato paste and red pepper flakes, cooking for an additional 2 minutes.
Gradually add heavy cream and cream cheese into the pan. Bring to a simmer and cook for another 3-4 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Mix cumin powder into the stew and season with salt and pepper as needed.
Once done, transfer the mixture to a warm serving dish and garnish with pickled onions if desired.
